---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the supported Neovim R workflow
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## User problem

Describe the R/Neovim workflow that is difficult today, rather than only the
requested implementation.

## Desired behavior

Explain what success would look like and whether it needs the live R session or
can work through static LSP analysis.

## Alternatives

Describe current workarounds and related plugins or standard LSP behavior.

## Scope check

ark.nvim is a Neovim-first R LSP and managed-session product. Positron/Jupyter,
notebook UI, DAP, remote tmux, and replacement of vim-slime/nvim-slimetree are
outside the current v1 boundary.
